form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after seven months 8th of 10 at Morphettville 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1200m, 6 len behind Tiptop Tori carrying 58kg at $15. Previously second-up 2nd of 13 at this track 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on August 13 over 1200m, on a slow track; neck behind Nadege carrying 58kg at $3.10. Rates highly and should do much better.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign seventh of 9 at Strathalbyn 3yo+ Mdn-Sw January 14 over 1100m, 9 len behind Harbour City carrying 56kg at $26. First up last campaign fifth of 10 at Balaklava 3yo+ Mdn-Sw September 24 over 1050m, 3.5 len behind Common Interest carrying 56kg at $61. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran last of 12 at Balaklava 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 4 over 1050m, slow going 9 len behind One Whim carrying 57kg at $81. Second-up ran last of 10 at Morphettville 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1200m, 14 len behind Tiptop Tori carrying 57kg at $201. Hard to have on what we have seen since his return.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 56-day let-up. Most recently 4th of 11 at Clare 3yo+ Mdn Hcp on February 13 over 1100m, 2 len behind Vercelli carrying 56.5kg at $7.50. The race before that sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 8 at Mt Gambier 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on January 25 over 906m, 4 len behind Gatsby Crown carrying 54kg at $2.80. Looks all set to run well again.

form.formComment: Mare by Overshare making her first appearance. Finished fifth in a Murray Bridge jump-out on March 23. Well educated with five hit-outs leading into this, the latest when fifth in a Murray Bridge jump-out.

form.formComment: At the latest run raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 10 at Port Lincoln 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1000m, 4 len behind Golden Tunes carrying 56kg at $12. Top prospects.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly making debut by Hualalai out of Mega Queen. Finished fourth in a Strathalbyn jump-out on March 10. Following that fifth at Strathalbyn in a 1000m trial on March 26. Fitter for recent trials so don?t dismiss lightly.
